StructurePhase.Reference: Summers Smith D., J. Inst. Met., v81 p73 (1952)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 458738. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Ti. Compound Preparation: arc-melted. CRUCIBLE: copper hearth. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 1273 K for 24 h and at 1173 K, water-quenched. Article Title: THE CONSTITUTION OF TANTALUM-TITANIUM ALLOYS. Temperature of Data Collection: 293 K. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
